\tzpentry{ID3579}{Quantum Curvature Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3579 introduces Quantum Curvature Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathcal E_{\rm vac}=\sum_{k}\frac{\hbar\omega_k}{2}\,R\!\Big(\frac{\omega_k}{\Lambda}\Big), \]
